mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id, name, price, stock, is_deleted FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, merchant_id, name, price, stock, is_deleted FROM product WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (merchant_id, name, price, stock, is_deleted) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET merchant_id = #{merchantId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
